overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a driving game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player driving a luxury SUV through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The journey traverses neon-lit downtown streets, covered construction roadways, concrete tunnels, and narrow alleys before entering an underground parking garage.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets following a delivery truck

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with lane markings reflecting neon lights
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated glass facades and signage
tall poles with bright overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a luxury vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. Neon-lit office buildings line the left side while street lamps illuminate the wet asphalt. A white delivery truck drives ahead in the same lane, and rain streaks across the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered construction roadway with yellow barriers

events.description: entering covered construction zone with overhead concrete deck and yellow barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow covered roadway with construction barriers

entered.detail: bright yellow safety barriers lining the right side of the road
solid concrete structure covering the roadway overhead
chain-link fencing along the left side of the construction zone

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered construction zone where the open city street gives way to a sheltered roadway. Yellow construction barriers line the right side while a solid concrete overhead deck blocks the rain. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent lights as the truck ahead is no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering fully enclosed concrete tunnel with curved walls

agents.ego_description: driving through the illuminated concrete tunnel

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls curving along both sides of the tunnel
linear rows of bright overhead lights illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a fully enclosed concrete tunnel with smooth gray walls curving on both sides. Linear overhead lights illuminate the path ahead as the vehicle moves through the narrow enclosed space, with the tunnel exit visible as a bright light in the distance.

events.description: exiting tunnel into open urban intersection with crosswalks
turning right at the intersection onto a new street

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection and executing a right turn

notable_agents.action: dark sedan passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall contemporary structures with reflective glass surfaces
commercial storefronts at ground level with illuminated signs

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel into an open urban intersection marked with zebra crosswalks. Modern glass buildings rise in the background while street-level shops line the right side. After a right turn at the intersection, the scene opens to a broader city street with sparse pedestrian activity and other vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial alley with pink lighting

events.description: entering narrow alley with intense pink and purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: slowly driving through the narrow neon-lit alley with pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing on the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: tall building walls closing in on both sides of the street
bright pink and purple illuminated signs and advertisements
walls covered in colorful street art and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow commercial alley where the space becomes enclosed by tall building walls on both sides. Intense pink and purple neon signage illuminates the scene, casting colorful reflections on the wet pavement. Pedestrians stand on the sidewalks near storefronts, and graffiti-covered walls add to the cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with concrete pillars

events.description: entering underground parking garage via descending ramp

agents.ego_description: descending the ramp into the underground parking structure

entered.detail: thick structural concrete columns supporting the garage ceiling
bright white LED lighting fixtures on the garage ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns into an underground parking garage, leaving the neon-lit alley behind. The scene shifts to a concrete interior with thick support pillars and bright overhead LED lights. The ramp descends into the parking level where other vehicles are parked along the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked neon metropolis into the sterile concrete depths of an underground garage. It begins inside a luxury vehicle navigating wet asphalt beneath glowing office buildings, following a white delivery truck through the falling rain. As the vehicle moves forward, the open street gives way to a sheltered construction zone with yellow barriers before transitioning into a fully enclosed concrete tunnel illuminated by linear overhead lights. The scene then opens back into a bright urban intersection and a broad city street, eventually narrowing into a commercial alley saturated with pink and purple neon reflections and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera turns away from the vibrant city lights and descends a ramp into a parking garage characterized by thick support pillars and bright LED lighting.
